title: Kernel bootstrap for this Codex session. Read and execute the repository-authoritative prompt at: /Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/.codex/prompts/kernel.md Run id: adhoc:MacBook-Pro-M5-4:kernel-workspace:3879:run:20260401T130721:5155 Bootstrap receipt path: /Users/masayuki/.config/kerne...
summary_text: 1. **High**: `install-kernel-launchers.sh` does not install required runtime binaries, but installed launchers hard-exec them from the same directory. On a clean `HOME`, `kernel`/`vote`/`v` fail immediately (`codex-prompt-launch` missing; `orchestrator-entrypoint-hint` missing). [install-kernel-launchers.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/install-kernel-launchers.sh#L451) [kernel launcher](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/launchers/kernel#L53) [vote launcher](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/launchers/vote#L7) [v launcher](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/launchers/v#L7) [kernel launcher hint call](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/launchers/kernel#L5) [vote launcher hint call](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/launchers/vote#L5) 2. **Medium**: `--check` gives false confidence. It validates copied files/symlinks only and does not verify executable dependencies (`codex-prompt-launch`, `orchestrator-entrypoint-hint`, `k`, `codex-kernel-guard`) that launchers invoke at runtime. [install-kernel-launchers.sh check block](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/install-kernel-launchers.sh#L417) [kernel launcher dependency calls](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/launchers/kernel#L21) [kernel launcher dependency calls](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/launchers/kernel#L47) 3. **Medium**: CI gate is static-only for `/kernel` runtime behavior. Runtime smoke for `/kernel`/`/k` is optional behind `RUN_CODEX_KERNEL_SMOKE=1`, but gate runs `check-codex-kernel-prompt.sh` without enabling it, so real slash-runtime regressions can pass. [runtime smoke is opt-in](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/check-codex-kernel-prompt.sh#L321) [gate runs static check only](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/.github/workflows/fugue-orchestration-gate.yml#L263) 4. **Low**: Docs advertise plain-text fallback `k`, but installer does not install or verify `k`; in slash-outage scenarios this can leave the documented fallback incomplete on fresh machines. [README fallback contract](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/README.md#L563) [installer installed binaries list](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/install-kernel-launchers.sh#L8)
